You decide not to risk it.

Welcome to the Royal Bank. I am the manager. How may I assist you?
A deposit box gives you 100 item storage slots. One-time fee of 200 gold.
We sell bank-grade financial instruments here.
You draw a weapon and grab the guard! 'Everyone stay calm!' (Thief Guild L12 only. Small chance of failure → jail. Success → vault_loot + gold bars.)
Good day!
How can I help you today?
Your savings account is now open. You may deposit any amount of gold and withdraw whenever you please.
How much would you like to deposit? (Enter amount in your gold.) Your gold is safely stored.
How much would you like to withdraw? (Up to what you have stored.) Gold returned to your inventory.
Have a prosperous day!
No funny business in this bank, understood?
You're making a big mistake! [Combat begins. Defeat guard to start robbery. Tiny failure chance → jail.]
Good.
Just here doing my banking.
Have a good day.
No talking to prisoners.
You're here because you broke the law. Serve your time or buy your way out.
Your sentence depends on what you did. Talk to the lawyer about bail.
Order!
I'm your appointed lawyer. You've been arrested. I can arrange bail — 250 gold — and get you released immediately.
Excellent. I'll have the paperwork sorted. You're free to go! [Removes jail condition, costs 250 gold.]
Standard thieving: 5 minutes real time. Bank robbery: 15 minutes. Or just pay bail.
Good luck!
I run a tight prison. You'll do your time and leave quietly.
Rough luck. What'd they get you for?
Ha! Amateur. I once lifted a duke's whole purse and he never noticed.
Bold! I tried that once. Ended up here. Worth it though.
Stay out of trouble. Or don't. More interesting that way.
This is the Red Tower. Level 1 — Novice territory. Prove yourself or fall.
Then show me your power! [AT combat begins]
Wise to retreat.
Magic flows from understanding, not just power.
The Grandmaster. Defeat them and the crystal is yours.
Go well.

You have gathered all 12 Tower Crystals. Remarkable. Present them all to me and receive the ultimate reward.
The crystals sing in harmony! You are the Crystal Master! Accept this Grandmaster's Sigil. [Quest complete. Sigil + 500 gold awarded.]
Return when all 12 crystals are in your possession.
The Ghost Lord regards you with hollow eyes. 'You dare disturb my domain?'
The ${boss} unleashes its full power! [AT combat begins — boss defeated = quest complete]
Flee before it's too late!
The Wraith King regards you with hollow eyes. 'You dare disturb my domain?'
The ${boss} unleashes its full power! [AT combat begins — boss defeated = quest complete]
Flee before it's too late!

The ${boss} unleashes its full power! [AT combat begins — boss defeated = quest complete]

Flee before it's too late!

The ${boss} unleashes its full power! [AT combat begins — boss defeated = quest complete]
Flee before it's too late!
The Death Knight regards you with hollow eyes. 'You dare disturb my domain?'
The ${boss} unleashes its full power! [AT combat begins — boss defeated = quest complete]
Flee before it's too late!
A cold wail fills the air. The ghost attacks! [AT combat]
The ghoul snarls and lunges! [AT combat]
The wraith attacks! [AT combat]
The spectre attacks! [AT combat]
The banshee attacks! [AT combat]
The skeleton attacks! [AT combat]
The zombie attacks! [AT combat]
The poltergeist attacks! [AT combat]
The revenant attacks! [AT combat]
The spirit attacks! [AT combat]
I am the Swamp Witch. I sense you seek knowledge... of a girl. Bring me what I need and I will show you what I know.
Four ingredients from the beasts of my swamp: a Bog Eye, Serpent Fang, Lizard Claw, and Toad Tongue. And two rare herbs from the swamp itself.
Your sister. She passed through this swamp. Something changed her. Bring me the ingredients first.
You have everything! [Takes ingredients, gives Vision Potion] This vision shows your sister heading toward the mountains — toward a cave that shimmers with dark magic.
The swamp watches.
Halt, surface dweller. Our cave is not for outsiders. Prove your worth and I may let you pass.
Find me a rare glowing mushroom from the deep cave. Return it and you may enter.
Well done. Pass, but do not cause trouble.
A surface dweller who fights well enough to reach me. What do you want?

replies.text: Your witch — I need her spell.

phrases.text: The witch's spell? She'll require 12 specific ingredients. Help our community first.
Our cave beast population has grown too large. Thin their numbers — kill 10 Shadow Spiders.
We are the Drow — children of Lloth. We do not trust the surface world. But we respect strength.
Leave us in peace.
I can cast a spell to take you to Lloth herself — but it requires 12 rare ingredients. Do you have them all?
Six things from the cave beasts, and six more from hidden places within the cave. [See quest log.]
[Checks inventory for all 12 ingredients] The spell is cast! Reality tears open... [Teleports player to Lloth's map.]
Return when you have all 12.
Welcome to our village, surface friend.
Safe travels.
You seek our blessing? We have been troubled by a strange creature in our fields. Drive it away and you have our blessing.
Go well.
Greetings from the moon! It's peaceful here.
Safe journey.
A visitor from the surface? Wonderful. We need your help to resolve a conflict with our neighbors. Will you help?
Return soon.

A mortal dares approach Lloth? Interesting. I will not destroy you — yet. I have a task. The dragons of the volcano have been fighting for centuries. It threatens the balance. Enter the volcano and settle this dispute.
Take this ring. When you have settled the dispute, it will return you to me. Now go.
Because you reached me. That alone is proof enough. Go.

You return. The dragon dispute is settled? Then my promise is kept. Your sister — the girl you seek — she was transformed into a Drow Elf by an ancient Drow curse. In her grief, she cast a tent spell onto a ring and lost it in the world. Find that ring. It will open a door to her.
Do not fail me.
[No conversation — attacks immediately.]
A Bronze Dragon regards you carefully. You are either very brave or very foolish.

replies.text: I am here for a quest.

phrases.text: We shall see. I have need of a capable mortal.
Recover my stolen scale collection from the ancient ruins to the east.
Good. Return when it's done.
Then face draconic wrath! [AT combat begins]
Fly safely, small one.
A Brass Dragon regards you carefully. You are either very brave or very foolish.

replies.text: I am here for a quest.

phrases.text: We shall see. I have need of a capable mortal.
Solve my riddle: 'I speak without a mouth. What am I?' Answer correctly to earn my cooperation.
Good. Return when it's done.
Then face draconic wrath! [AT combat begins]
Fly safely, small one.
A Copper Dragon regards you carefully. You are either very brave or very foolish.

replies.text: I am here for a quest.

Collect 5 rare prismatic crystals from the caverns. I need them for my hoard.
Good. Return when it's done.
Then face draconic wrath! [AT combat begins]
Fly safely, small one.
A Silver Dragon regards you carefully. You are either very brave or very foolish.

Then face draconic wrath! [AT combat begins]
Fly safely, small one.
A Gold Dragon regards you carefully. You are either very brave or very foolish.

Good. Return when it's done.
Then face draconic wrath! [AT combat begins]

Ancient Platinum Dragon studies you with golden eyes. 'All 10 lesser dragons have spoken of you. You have earned an audience. My quest: broker a peace between all dragon kinds — good and evil — for 100 years.'
Carry my Peace Ring and speak to the ancient Chromatic. Together, you will forge the accord.
Then go. When both quests are fulfilled, the Peace Ring will sing — and you will be transported back to Lloth.
The peace of ages depends on you.

Ancient Chromatic Dragon coils before you, scales shimmering all colours. 'The platinum one sent you? ... I have considered this peace. I accept — under one condition. You must first retrieve the Prism of Accord from the dead volcano.'
Retrieve it and return. Then the accord is sealed — and the Dragon Peace Ring activates. May it carry you back to Lloth.
Do not delay.
Halt. This path leads to a place of power. Only those who carry Sunny's Ring may pass.
[Checks inventory for ring_sunny_tent] The ring resonates... you may pass.
Come back when you have the ring.

[Sunny turns to you, her dark Drow eyes gentle.] 'You found me. I am sorry I worried you all. What was done to me... I have accepted it. And more than that — I have grown. The Drow magic transformed me, but it also elevated me. I have become something more.'
Yes. Truly. I am at peace. But I cannot return to the mortal world. My place is here now, between worlds.
I cannot, dear one. This is my home now. But know that I am safe. And loved. Tell Mother and Father I love them.
[Sunny glows softly, then fades. A cascade of treasure rains down. Ozzy and Nymph weep together, then disappear. The drow villages fall silent.]
My daughter... she is gone. But at peace. That is more than I hoped for.
[Ozzy fades.]
My sweet Sunny... [weeps softly, then smiles] She is more than we ever imagined.
[Nymph fades.]
Welcome, friend! I am Ozzy, lord of this castle. Tell me — have you news of my daughter Sunny? She has been away... rather too long.
Please! What have you found? [Quest update available]
Keep looking, please. She means everything to us.
Safe travels!
Hello dear, welcome to our home! Make yourself comfortable. Have you seen our daughter Sunny by any chance?
Please find her. A mother's heart aches.
Greetings! I could use your help.
A bandit leader has been spotted in the eastern woods. Bring me proof of their defeat.
How stands the forest now?
Thank you!
Greetings! I could use your help.
I need rare spices from the market — cinnamon bark, saffron thread, and peppervine root.
My pantry thanks you!
Thank you!
Greetings! I could use your help.
Three books have gone missing from the restricted section. Find the borrower and retrieve them.
My shelves are complete again.
Thank you!
Greetings! I could use your help.
Something has been eating the royal rose garden at night. Find out what and stop it.
The roses bloom again!
Thank you!
Greetings! I could use your help.
I lost my travel journal somewhere in the village. It contains sensitive notes.
You are a lifesaver!
Thank you!
Greetings! I could use your help.
I'm looking for a rare mineral — star iron — supposedly found in the old mine.
Remarkable! Exactly what I needed.
Thank you!
Greetings! I could use your help.
A suspicious merchant has been loitering near the gate. Find out who he really is.
You've secured the castle!
Thank you!
Greetings! I could use your help.
The laundry went missing from the drying line. Three sets of noble garments!
Back where they belong!
Thank you!
Greetings! I could use your help.
I need to deliver a sealed message to the blacksmith in town without being seen.
Delivered safe and sound!
Thank you!
Greetings! I could use your help.
The wine cellar key has gone missing. Help me find it before the banquet!
The lord thanks you!
Thank you!
Greetings! I could use your help.
One of the prisoners escaped. Track them to the old mill and bring them back.
Order is restored.
Thank you!
Greetings! I could use your help.
My fool's cap was stolen by a crow! Find the nest and get it back.
Ha! The jester rides again!
Thank you!
Just doing my duty.
Just doing my duty.
Just doing my duty.
Just doing my duty.
Just doing my duty.
Just doing my duty.
Just doing my duty.
Welcome to the castle armoury. I sell the finest castle-branded weapons and shields.
12 castle-branded weapons available — Shortsword through Claymore. Prices 180–400 gold.
12 castle-branded shields — Round Shield through Aegis. Prices 160–380 gold.
Fight with honour!
Castle armour, finest quality. From chainmail coif to full plate cuirass.
12 armour pieces — Chainmail to Full Plate. Prices 150–425 gold.
Wear it in good health!
Welcome! I sell healing potions and cures for every ailment. What ails you?
Minor Heal (15g): +10 HP. Healing Potion (40g): +25 HP. Major Heal (80g): +50 HP.
24 ailment cures, 30-150 gold each. I also study the 6 creatures that cause them — Plague Rat, Venomous Serpent, Shock Scorpion, Frost Wight, Shadow Banshee, and Infernal Imp.
Poison, Bleed, Blind, Stun, Weakness, Slow, Burn, Freeze, Shock, Fear, Confuse, Silence, Curse, Disease, Exhaustion, Paralyze, Madness, Plague, Nausea, Severe Bleed, Drain, Hex, Petrify, Wither.
Stay healthy!
I am the Guard Captain. The castle's safety is my responsibility. I may have work for you.
A bandit leader has been spotted in the eastern woods. Bring me proof of their defeat.
Dismissed.
